name: log-rotation
command: find ~/.senkani/schedules/worktrees -type d -mtime +3 -print -exec rm -rf {} + ; find ~/.senkani/logs -type f -mtime +30 -delete ; find ~/.senkani/research -type f -mtime +90 -delete
description: Sunday 03:00 sweep: purge old worktrees, 30-day-old logs, 90-day-old research notes.
